stage.subtitle_ar: خطوتكِ الأولى في عالم التقنية بالإنجليزية: الحاسوب، والبرنامج، والإنترنت بكلمات بسيطة وواثقة.

content.intro_ar: الحاسوب هو أوّل أداة في رحلتكِ نحو تخصّص تقنية المعلومات، وفهمه بالإنجليزية يفتح لكِ أبواب هذا المجال. في هذا الدرس ستتعرّفين على أجزاء الحاسوب الأساسية وأسمائها الإنجليزية، وكيف يخزّن البيانات ويعمل بسرعة. لنبدأ من الأساس بثقة.

vocab.meaning_en: a machine that stores and works with data
vocab.example: She uses a computer to write code.

vocab.meaning_en: the flat part where you see words and pictures
vocab.example: I read the words on the screen.

vocab.meaning_en: the part with keys for typing
vocab.example: I type my name on the keyboard.

vocab.meaning_en: a small tool to move and click
vocab.example: She moves the mouse with her hand.

vocab.meaning_en: facts, words, and numbers a computer keeps
vocab.example: The computer saves my data.

vocab.meaning_en: a thing that does work for us
vocab.example: A computer is a fast machine.

vocab.meaning_en: the computer parts you can touch
vocab.example: The screen and keyboard are hardware.

vocab.meaning_en: a small part you press
vocab.example: Press the button to turn it on.

vocab.meaning_en: to keep something to use later
vocab.example: Computers store many files.

vocab.meaning_en: to work with a thing
vocab.example: I use a computer every day.

vocab.meaning_en: working with great speed
vocab.example: A computer is very fast.

vocab.meaning_en: to do a job
vocab.example: The computer works well.

paragraphs: A computer is a machine. It helps people do many things. You can see a screen with words and pictures. You can touch a keyboard and a mouse. These parts are hardware. You can hold them in your hands. A computer is very fast and strong.
A computer can store data. Data is facts, words, and numbers. You use the keyboard to type words. You use the mouse to click and move. You press a button to turn on the computer.

People use computers every day. Students use a computer to study and to read. Programmers use a computer to write code. A computer can work fast, and it does not get tired. It is a helpful machine for your school and your future job.

key_phrases.en: I use a computer every day.
Click the mouse to open it.
The screen shows words and pictures.

comprehension.question: What is a computer?
comprehension.explanation_ar: الحاسوب آلة تساعدنا على إنجاز الأعمال.

comprehension.question: Which parts are hardware?
comprehension.explanation_ar: العتاد هو الأجزاء التي يمكن لمسها مثل لوحة المفاتيح والفأرة.

comprehension.question: What does a computer store?
comprehension.explanation_ar: الحاسوب يخزّن البيانات مثل الكلمات والأرقام.

comprehension.question: How does a computer work?
options: Fast, and it does not get tired
comprehension.correct: Fast, and it does not get tired

task.prompt_en: Write 3–4 sentences about the computer you use.
task.prompt_ar: اكتبي ٣–٤ جُمل عن الحاسوب الذي تستخدمينه.
task.guidance_ar: استخدمي ٣ كلمات على الأقل من كلمات الدرس، مثل: screen، keyboard، data.

content.intro_ar: خلف كل شاشة يعمل برنامج، وستكونين يومًا مَن يكتب هذه البرامج. في هذا الدرس ستفهمين ما هو البرنامج والكود والتطبيق بالإنجليزية، وكيف يتبع الحاسوب خطوات البرنامج. هذه الكلمات ستلازمكِ طوال دراستكِ ومهنتكِ.

vocab.meaning_en: a set of steps that tells a computer what to do
vocab.example: A program tells the computer what to do.

vocab.meaning_en: the words a programmer writes for a computer
vocab.example: She writes code every day.

vocab.meaning_en: a small program on a phone or computer
vocab.example: I open the app to send a message.

vocab.meaning_en: a person who writes code
vocab.example: A programmer makes new programs.

vocab.meaning_en: programs you use, not the parts you touch
vocab.example: Software runs on the computer.

vocab.meaning_en: to start a program or file
vocab.example: Open the app to start.

vocab.meaning_en: to make a program work
vocab.example: The computer runs the program.

vocab.meaning_en: one small action in a set of actions
vocab.example: A program has many steps.

vocab.meaning_en: one thing you tell the computer to do
vocab.example: The code gives the computer an instruction.

vocab.meaning_en: easy, not hard
vocab.example: My first program is very simple.

vocab.meaning_en: to make words or code
vocab.example: I write code to make an app.

vocab.meaning_en: a job to do
vocab.example: A program can do a hard task fast.

paragraphs: A program is a set of steps. It tells the computer what to do. A computer cannot think for you. It only follows the steps in the program, one by one. Each step is one instruction.

A programmer writes the program. She writes code with words and numbers. This code is software. You cannot touch software with your hands. You open it on the screen, and then the computer runs it for you.

An app is a small program. You use apps every day. One app plays music. One app sends a message. A good program is simple and fast. It can do a hard task in one second. Soon you will write your first program too. Writing code is fun to learn.

key_phrases.en: A program tells the computer what to do.
I write code to make an app.
Open the app and run it.

comprehension.question: What is a program?
options: A set of steps for the computer
comprehension.correct: A set of steps for the computer
comprehension.explanation_ar: البرنامج مجموعة من الخطوات التي تخبر الحاسوب بما يفعل.

comprehension.question: Who writes code?
comprehension.explanation_ar: المبرمج أو المبرمجة هو من يكتب الكود.

comprehension.question: What is software?
comprehension.explanation_ar: البرمجيات هي البرامج التي لا يمكن لمسها، بعكس العتاد.

comprehension.question: What is an app?
comprehension.explanation_ar: التطبيق برنامج صغير نستخدمه على الهاتف أو الحاسوب.

comprehension.question: What does the computer do with a program?

task.prompt_en: Say 3–4 sentences: What is a program? Give one example of an app you use.
task.prompt_ar: تحدّثي بـ ٣–٤ جُمل: ما هو البرنامج؟ واذكري مثالًا لتطبيق تستخدمينه.
task.guidance_ar: استخدمي ٣ كلمات على الأقل من كلمات الدرس، مثل: program، code، app.

content.intro_ar: الإنترنت هو النافذة التي يعمل عليها المبرمجون كل يوم، وإتقان مصطلحاته بالإنجليزية ضرورة في تخصّصكِ. في هذا الدرس ستتعلّمين كلمات الإنترنت والمتصفّح والموقع والرابط، وكيف نتّصل ونبحث ونرسل البريد. استعدّي لتصبح الإنجليزية التقنية لغتكِ اليومية.

vocab.meaning_en: a big network that joins computers around the world
vocab.example: The internet joins computers all over the world.

vocab.meaning_en: a place on the internet with pages
vocab.example: I visit a website to read the news.

vocab.meaning_en: a program to open websites
vocab.example: I open a browser to find a website.

vocab.meaning_en: computers that are joined together
vocab.example: A network joins many computers.

vocab.meaning_en: connected to the internet
vocab.example: She is online every evening.

vocab.meaning_en: to join to something
vocab.example: I connect my phone to the internet.

vocab.meaning_en: a word or picture you click to go to a page
vocab.example: Click the link to open the page.

vocab.meaning_en: a message you send on the internet
vocab.example: I send an email to my teacher.

vocab.meaning_en: to save a file from the internet
vocab.example: I download a file from the website.

vocab.meaning_en: to look for something
vocab.example: I search for an answer online.

vocab.meaning_en: one screen of a website
vocab.example: This website has many pages.

vocab.meaning_en: a way to connect to the internet with no wires
vocab.example: I use Wi-Fi at home.

paragraphs: The internet is a very big network. It joins computers all over the world. When you connect to the internet, you are online. Many people use Wi-Fi at home to connect with no wires. The internet never sleeps.
You open a browser to use the internet. A browser is a program. It opens a website. A website has many pages. You click a link to go to a new page. You can search for words and find answers fast.

The internet helps you every day. You can send an email to a friend. You can download a file to your computer. Students learn online, and programmers find help online too. The internet is a big part of your future work. It brings the whole world to your screen.

key_phrases.en: Click the link to open the page.
I send an email to my teacher.
I download a file from the website.

comprehension.question: What is the internet?
comprehension.explanation_ar: الإنترنت شبكة كبيرة تربط الحواسيب حول العالم.

comprehension.question: What do you open to use the internet?
comprehension.explanation_ar: نفتح المتصفّح لتصفّح الإنترنت وفتح المواقع.

comprehension.question: What do you click to go to a new page?
comprehension.explanation_ar: ننقر على الرابط للانتقال إلى صفحة جديدة.

comprehension.question: How can you connect with no wires?
comprehension.explanation_ar: نتّصل بالإنترنت بدون أسلاك باستخدام الواي فاي.

comprehension.question: What can you send to a friend?
comprehension.explanation_ar: يمكن إرسال بريد إلكتروني (email) إلى صديق عبر الإنترنت.

task.prompt_en: Write 3–4 sentences about how you use the internet.
task.prompt_ar: اكتبي ٣–٤ جُمل عن طريقة استخدامكِ للإنترنت.
task.guidance_ar: استخدمي ٣ كلمات على الأقل من كلمات الدرس، مثل: internet، website، browser.
